contestedTitles: Microtask-deferred first setTime is justified by an inaccurate 'first COMMITTED paint' rationale
Mount-gate implemented via a single nullable `time` state + microtask defer, not the `[mounted, setMounted]` two-state pattern that design D2 and task 3.3 prescribe verbatim
resolution: All findings resolved (orchestrator, third party). font-mono now maps to the loaded Geist Mono (@theme inline); tasks.md 5.3 ticked + stale STOP note replaced with RESOLVED (test corrected earlier to assert 16:30:01); added an explicit location-independence test (clock renders standalone, no useLocation). Contested doc-drift: design.md D2 + the TopClock comment now accurately describe the shipped single-nullable time + microtask mount-gate. Battery green: lint, typecheck, 173 tests, build, openspec, trace.
